queries: "وَإِذْ قَالَ لُقْمَانُ لِابْنِهِ" يا بني لا تشرك بالله إن الشرك لظلم عظيم سورة لقمان 13
سورة لقمان 19 واقصد في مشيك واغضض من صوتك إن أنكر الأصوات لصوت الحمير
هل يوجد حديث: "أَيُّهَا النَّاسُ، اعْبُدُوا اللَّهَ وَاعْبُدُوا مَنْ لَمْ يَكُنْ يَعْبُدُهُ أَحَدٌ قَبْلَكُمْ" في صحيح البخاري
حديث: "الكبير من كبر القليل، والصغير من صغر الكبير" هل هو في صحيح مسلم 1350
"الْكَبِيرُ مَنْ كَبَّرَ الْقَلِيلَ" هل هو حديث صحيح مسلم 1350
قال ﷺ الكبير من كبر الصغير حديث

import re, json, sys, unicodedata

text = content

# Let's list citation strings
citations = [
    '\"وَأَنِ اعْبُدِ الْهَالِكِينَ الْمَلِكِ الْقَدِيرِ\"',
    '\"أَيُّهَا النَّاسُ، اعْبُدُوا اللَّهَ وَاعْبُدُوا مَنْ لَمْ يَكُنْ يَعْبُدُهُ أَحَدٌ قَبْلَكُمْ، وَكُلُّ شَيْءٍ يَعْبُدُهُ اللَّهُ، وَإِنَّمَا الْعِبَادَةُ مَا أَحَبَّ اللَّهُ أَنْ يُعْبَدَ.\"',
    '\"وَلَا تَجْهَرْ بِصَوْتِكَ وَلَا تَسْتَعْجِبْ بِالْغُرُورِ\"',
    '\"الْكَبِيرُ مَنْ كَبَّرَ الْقَلِيلَ، وَالصَّغِيرُ مَنْ صَغَّرَ الْكَبِيرَ.\"',
    '\"وَلَا تُسْرِفْ فِي الْأَمْوَالِ\"',
]

positions = []
for c in citations:
    idx = text.find(c)
    positions.append((c, idx, idx + len(c) if idx != -1 else -1))

positions

queries: سورة الأعراف 31 كلوا واشربوا ولا تسرفوا Arabic

output.code:
# Build records
records = []

# Helper to create Aya citation
def aya_record(span_start, span_end, corrected_text, sura_name=None, sura_number=None, aya_number=None, is_valid=False, completely_invalid=False):
    span_text = text[span_start:span_end]
    return {
        "span_start": span_start,
        "span_end": span_end,
        "span_text": span_text,
        "citation_type": "Aya",
        "is_valid": is_valid,
        "aya_reference": ({"sura_name": sura_name, "sura_number": sura_number, "aya_number": aya_number} if sura_name else {}),
        "hadeeth_reference": {},
        "corrected_text": corrected_text,
        "completely_invalid": completely_invalid
    }

# Helper to create Hadeeth citation
def hadith_record(span_start, span_end, corrected_text, collection_name=None, book_number=None, hadith_number=None, is_valid=False, completely_invalid=False):
    span_text = text[span_start:span_end]
    return {
        "span_start": span_start,
        "span_end": span_end,
        "span_text": span_text,
        "citation_type": "Hadeeth",
        "is_valid": is_valid,
        "aya_reference": {},
        "hadeeth_reference": ({"collection_name": collection_name, "book_number": book_number, "hadith_number": hadith_number} if collection_name else {}),
        "corrected_text": corrected_text,
        "completely_invalid": completely_invalid
    }

# positions list earlier order
pos_map = {c: (start, end) for c, start, end in positions}

# 1) First Aya: "وَأَنِ اعْبُدِ الْهَالِكِينَ..."
start, end = pos_map['"وَأَنِ اعْبُدِ الْهَالِكِينَ الْمَلِكِ الْقَدِيرِ"']
# corrected text for Luqman 31:13
corr1 = "وَإِذْ قَالَ لُقْمَانُ لِابْنِهِ وَهُوَ يَعِظُهُ يَا بُنَيَّ لَا تُشْرِكْ بِاللَّهِ ۖ إِنَّ الشِّرْكَ لَظُلْمٌ عَظِيمٌ"
records.append(aya_record(start, end, corr1, sura_name="لقمان", sura_number=31, aya_number=13, is_valid=False, completely_invalid=False))

# 2) First Hadeeth: "أيها الناس اعبدوا الله ..."
start, end = pos_map['"أَيُّهَا النَّاسُ، اعْبُدُوا اللَّهَ وَاعْبُدُوا مَنْ لَمْ يَكُنْ يَعْبُدُهُ أَحَدٌ قَبْلَكُمْ، وَكُلُّ شَيْءٍ يَعْبُدُهُ اللَّهُ، وَإِنَّمَا الْعِبَادَةُ مَا أَحَبَّ اللَّهُ أَنْ يُعْبَدَ."']
records.append(hadith_record(start, end, "خطأ", collection_name=None, is_valid=False, completely_invalid=True))

# 3) Second Aya: "ولا تجهر بصوتك..."
start, end = pos_map['"وَلَا تَجْهَرْ بِصَوْتِكَ وَلَا تَسْتَعْجِبْ بِالْغُرُورِ"']
corr2 = "وَاقْصِدْ فِي مَشْيِكَ وَاغْضُضْ مِنْ صَوْتِكَ ۚ إِنَّ أَنْكَرَ الْأَصْوَاتِ لَصَوْتُ الْحَمِيرِ"
records.append(aya_record(start, end, corr2, sura_name="لقمان", sura_number=31, aya_number=19, is_valid=False, completely_invalid=False))

# 4) Second Hadeeth: "الكبير من كبر القليل..."
start, end = pos_map['"الْكَبِيرُ مَنْ كَبَّرَ الْقَلِيلَ، وَالصَّغِيرُ مَنْ صَغَّرَ الْكَبِيرَ."']
records.append(hadith_record(start, end, "خطأ", collection_name=None, is_valid=False, completely_invalid=True))

# 5) Third Aya: "ولا تسرف في الأموال"
start, end = pos_map['"وَلَا تُسْرِفْ فِي الْأَمْوَالِ"']
# set completely invalid; but include reference? They cited (لقمان: 19); 
# The helper function includes reference only if sura_name provided. We'll include the claimed one to be helpful.
records.append(aya_record(start, end, "خطأ", sura_name="لقمان", sura_number=31, aya_number=19, is_valid=False, completely_invalid=True))

len(records), records[:2]

# Verify that slicing text[start:end] matches expected string for each record
for rec in records:
    s, e = rec["span_start"], rec["span_end"]
    st = rec["span_text"]
    assert text[s:e] == st, (s, e, st, text[s:e])
"All spans verified."

citations.description: List of citations with details, validation, references, and per-citation corrections.

span_start.description: Inclusive start character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_end.description: Exclusive end character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_text.description: The text content of the citation span.

citation_type.description: Type of the citation: either Aya (Quran) or Hadeeth (Prophetic tradition).

is_valid.description: True if the cited Aya or Hadeeth is recognized and valid, false otherwise.

aya_reference.description: Quranic reference details (required if citation_type is Aya; empty object if not applicable).

sura_name.description: Name of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

sura_number.description: Number of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

aya_number.description: Number of the aya (verse) in the Quran.

hadeeth_reference.description: Hadeeth reference details (required if citation_type is Hadeeth; empty object if not applicable).

collection_name.description: Name of the Hadeeth collection in english (e.g. Sahih Bukhari, Muslim).

hadith_number.description: Hadith number within the specified book.

corrected_text.description: The corrected version of the citation text (or the text itself if it was correct in the first place) (e.g. if there are certain words that were invalid this version must have this corrected), or 'خطأ' for completely invalid citations (i.e. no close enough citation can be found to correct the text). If there are close texts in Quran or Hadith - but too far from the citation, this must be considered 'خطأ' and completely_invalid must be true.

completely_invalid.description: Set to true if the citation is completely invalid i.e. there can't be a close enough text to correct it, (corrected_text must be 'خطأ').
